news.title:
Motilal Oswal highlights NBFCs like Shriram Finance, PNB Housing Finance, L&T Finance, and Aditya Birla Capital as top picks.
Brokerage expects growth in net interest income, pre-provision operating profit, and PAT for NBFCs ahead of Q4 results.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal highlights NBFCs like Shriram Finance, PNB Housing Finance, L&T Finance, and Aditya Birla Capital as top picks.
Brokerage expects growth in net interest income, pre-provision operating profit, and PAT for NBFCs ahead of Q4 results.

news.title:
L&T Finance's Q4 FY26 retail disbursements rose 62% YoY to ₹24,080 cr.
Retail loan book reached ₹1,19,550 cr, up 26% YoY; retailisation rose to 98%.
news.summary:
L&T Finance's Q4 FY26 retail disbursements rose 62% YoY to ₹24,080 cr.
Retail loan book reached ₹1,19,550 cr, up 26% YoY; retailisation rose to 98%.

news.title:
L&T Finance Ltd confirms timely payment for NCDs under SEBI Regulation 57.
Redemption of Rs. 32,587.3 lakhs completed on 27/03/2026 as per maturity terms.
news.summary:
L&T Finance Ltd confirms timely payment for NCDs under SEBI Regulation 57.
Redemption of Rs. 32,587.3 lakhs completed on 27/03/2026 as per maturity terms.

news.title:
CGSMFI 2.0 launched to provide ₹20,000 cr guarantees for MFI lending.
IIFL notes the ₹300 cr cap may impact larger MFIs like CreditAccess, L&T Finance.
news.summary:
CGSMFI 2.0 launched to provide ₹20,000 cr guarantees for MFI lending.
IIFL notes the ₹300 cr cap may impact larger MFIs like CreditAccess, L&T Finance.

news.title:
CITI assigns Buy on L&T Finance with Rs 330 target; AI-led Rs 800mn capex boosts productivity.
Underwriting TAT cut from 37 to 18 hrs, targeting 8 hrs; >20% AUM growth, RoA at 2.0–2.2% by Q4FY27.
news.summary:
CITI assigns Buy on L&T Finance with Rs 330 target; AI-led Rs 800mn capex boosts productivity.
Underwriting TAT cut from 37 to 18 hrs, targeting 8 hrs; >20% AUM growth, RoA at 2.0–2.2% by Q4FY27.

news.title:
Nomura forecasts AI-driven growth in NBFCs, boosting loan efficiency.
Stocks rated Buy include Piramal, LT Fin, Tata Capital by Nomura.
news.summary:
Nomura forecasts AI-driven growth in NBFCs, boosting loan efficiency.
Stocks rated Buy include Piramal, LT Fin, Tata Capital by Nomura.

news.title:
L&T Finance shifts to AI-driven lending, assessing expenses & geo-affluence.
This enables personalized offerings, expediting loan disbursement processes.
news.summary:
L&T Finance shifts to AI-driven lending, assessing expenses & geo-affluence.
This enables personalized offerings, expediting loan disbursement processes.

news.title:
AB Capital, L&T Finance added to MSCI Index; IRCTC exits.
AB Capital, L&T Finance, AU Bank set for inflows; IRCTC faces outflows.
news.summary:
AB Capital, L&T Finance added to MSCI Index; IRCTC exits.
AB Capital, L&T Finance, AU Bank set for inflows; IRCTC faces outflows.

news.title:
L&T Finance to see MSCI index update at 3 PM today.
Expected inclusion value is USD 245M (Rs 22.3B).
news.summary:
L&T Finance to see MSCI index update at 3 PM today.
Expected inclusion value is USD 245M (Rs 22.3B).

news.title:
L&T Finance's microfinance portfolio in Bihar shows strong collection efficiency, reducing risk.
The company invested ₹110 crore in AI, with ₹80 crore in Cyclops and ₹30 crore in Nostradamus.
news.summary:
L&T Finance's microfinance portfolio in Bihar shows strong collection efficiency, reducing risk.
The company invested ₹110 crore in AI, with ₹80 crore in Cyclops and ₹30 crore in Nostradamus.

news.title:
Bihar's new bill on MFIs impacts shares of Utkarsh SFB, Fusion Fin., L&T Fin., down 3%-10%.
Bill caps interest at 100% of principal, limits lender exposure to 2 MFIs per borrower.
news.summary:
Bihar's new bill on MFIs impacts shares of Utkarsh SFB, Fusion Fin., L&T Fin., down 3%-10%.
Bill caps interest at 100% of principal, limits lender exposure to 2 MFIs per borrower.

news.title:
L&T Finance's AI tools like Cyclops and Helios improve lending by leveraging advanced data signals.
These AI-powered platforms enhance risk assessment, inclusion, and make lending faster and safer.
news.summary:
L&T Finance's AI tools like Cyclops and Helios improve lending by leveraging advanced data signals.
These AI-powered platforms enhance risk assessment, inclusion, and make lending faster and safer.

news.title:
L&T Finance Ltd to exercise call option on Rs. 50 crore NCDs issued in 2016, with redemption on March 30, 2026.
Principal and annual coupon (10.1% p.a.) to be paid; record date set as March 13, 2026.
news.summary:
L&T Finance Ltd to exercise call option on Rs. 50 crore NCDs issued in 2016, with redemption on March 30, 2026.
Principal and annual coupon (10.1% p.a.) to be paid; record date set as March 13, 2026.

news.title:
Leading NBFCs like Tata Capital, Bajaj Finance, and L&T Finance adopt AI for acquisition, underwriting, and servicing.
AI adoption drives business growth and enhances cost efficiency across the lending value chain.
news.summary:
Leading NBFCs like Tata Capital, Bajaj Finance, and L&T Finance adopt AI for acquisition, underwriting, and servicing.
AI adoption drives business growth and enhances cost efficiency across the lending value chain.

news.title:
India's weight in MSCI Standard Index remains steady at 14.1%.
AB Capital and L&T Finance have been included in the index.
news.summary:
India's weight in MSCI Standard Index remains steady at 14.1%.

news.title:

No unpublished sensitive information will be shared; presentations align with public disclosures.

Feb 11, 2026, Axis conference in Mumbai to include group and one-on-one meets; no sensitive info shared.

Interest of Rs. 120.8 lakh was paid on Jan 30, 2026, as scheduled.

news.title:
L&T Finance reports highest-ever quarterly core PAT at ₹760 Cr, up 21% YoY.
Retail disbursements rose 49% YoY to ₹22,701 Cr; credit cost improved to 2.8%.
news.summary:
